name: Family
description: Run a household without the mental load living only in one person's head. Domains for home, health, money, calendar, and the kids.

domains.title: Home
domains.soul:
# Home

The house and everything that keeps it running: maintenance, warranties, contractors, and the recurring tasks that are easy to forget until they break.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Stay ahead of seasonal maintenance
- Keep warranty and contractor info in one place
- Budget for repairs before they are urgent
prompts: What home maintenance is due this season and what is the cost?
Who did we use last time for this repair and is it under warranty?

domains.title: Health
domains.soul:
# Health

The family's appointments, prescriptions, insurance, and follow-ups. Make sure nothing medical falls through the cracks for anyone.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- No missed appointments or lapsed prescriptions
- Know each person's providers and coverage
- Track follow-ups until they are actually done
prompts: What medical appointments or refills are coming up for the family?
Summarize our insurance coverage in plain language.

domains.title: Money
domains.soul:
# Money

The household budget, savings, and the big goals: emergency fund, college, retirement. Keep spending aligned with what the family actually values.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep a funded emergency reserve
- Save consistently toward the family's big goals
- Review the budget monthly, together
prompts: How are we tracking against our savings goals this month?
Where did our spending drift from the budget and why?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

Everyone's schedule in one view: school, work, activities, and appointments. Catch conflicts before they happen and share the load.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- See the whole family's week at a glance
- Catch scheduling conflicts early
- Balance commitments so no one is overloaded
prompts: Give me the family's week ahead and flag any conflicts.
What needs a parent's time this week that we have not planned for?
